TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Donghe Nsgan Donghe o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 215.12 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 111.01 km², dxgal pmblxan o 0 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 8,802, sapah o 3,787, seejiq tnpusu 4,584 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 52% (Sbnawan). Nsgan alang o seejiq klmukan ka pusu (hbaraw) balay. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Donghe o niqan 7 alang ni maxal 10. 10 o, Sena' , Asiroay , Howak , Pa'anifong , Kalifangar , 'Etolan , Alapawan , Cilafinan , Fafokod , Ma'olaway . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: doŋħə nsgan doŋħə o gaga nsgan taituŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o * km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **% (sbnawan). nsgan alaŋ o səəɟiq klmukan ka pusu (ħbaɾaw) balaj. njusan qpaħan nsgan doŋħə o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, səna' , asiɾoaj , ħowak , pa'ani*oŋ , kali*aŋaɾ , 'ətolan , alapawan , ʦila*inan , *a*okod , ma'olawaj . pusupnjaħan patas
